title: Final review of epic e7c diff
description: Meta-work tick (orchestrator-owned). Review the full diff of epic e7c (TUI roadmap selection, cross-epic graph blockers, PR+CI gate config) against its base branch. Focus areas: (1) tk graph cross-epic blocker semantics match ready.go (missing blockers treated as closed); (2) TUI selection does not regress display-only rendering paths or the m-toggle; (3) .tick/config.md Rules wording is concise enough to inject verbatim into implementer prompts. Run a reviewer subagent per references/claude-runner.md, Reviewing the work.
acceptance_criteria: epic diff reviewed; all blocker-severity findings resolved or routed as ticks before close-out unblocks
